steps.title: Apply Vieta's shortcut: sum = −b/a
steps.content: Sum of solutions $= -b/a = -(-18)/1 = 18$. No solving needed. That matches the correct answer — A is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above is $18$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore A is correct.
